name: Cactus Chili No. 2982
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat along with the onion and garlic.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Add all the remaining ingredients to the slow cooker.
4. Mix thoroughly.
5. Cook on low for 7 to 8 hours.
6. Serve with sour cream, chopped green onions, grated sharp Cheddar cheese, and crushed red pepper flakes alongside.
